About Tema Roofing and Siding

12+ years serving Philadelphia and surrounding areas

Tema Roofing and Siding started with a simple goal: to provide Philadelphia homeowners with durable, dependable siding solutions. We're not just installers; we're craftsmen who understand the unique challenges our city presents, from freeze-thaw cycles to historic rowhouse maintenance.

Our approach is straightforward: honest assessments, quality materials, and meticulous workmanship. We believe in clear communication and exceeding expectations, ensuring every project stands the test of time and weather.

Tema Roofing and Siding is invested in the Philadelphia community. We source local materials whenever possible and actively support neighborhood initiatives. We’re committed to building a stronger, more resilient Philadelphia, one home at a time.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Tema Roofing And Siding

Trusted siding installer professionals serving Philadelphia, PA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
